title: cheilotheca crocea
intro: Cheilotheca crocea is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as a tropical gentian. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cheilotheca crocea include reducing fever, alleviating skin irritations, and soothing coughs, making it a popular herbal remedy in some regions. Herbal preparations of Cheilotheca crocea often involve the plant's leaves and stems being dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
